name: Device Name Functions J1939
title: Device Name Functions J1939
syntax: long J1939TestMakeName( char deviceName[8], long aac, long ig, long vsi, long vs, long fct, long fcti, long ecui, long mc, long in );
description: The function can be implemented in your CAPL program. The J1939 Test Service Library calls this function if the NMT table changes. The CAPL program can react on this changes.
